cracked_glass.title: Cracked Glass Effect
cracked_glass.description: The cracked glass effect occurs when the main ideas are linked indirectly through supporting details, rather than being connected in a direct or explicit way.

fields.name: Examples of Cracked Glass in Mindmaps
A Symptom of what?
fields.value: Cracked Glass is a symptom of undeveloped yada yada reasoning, it tends to be linked to x y z, check alpha beta gamma, refer to the guide on this by doing /guide_x

Waterfalling Effect.title: Waterfalling Effect
Waterfalling Effect.description: Waterfalling effect is when your mindmap waterfalls
